note: Framework fully implemented and tested. Full simulation requires complete startup code for bare-metal ARM.

theoretical_estimates.note: Based on MobileNetV2 INT8 characteristics and Cortex-M7 specifications

stm32h7.basis: Theoretical estimate: ~90 cycles per MAC operation, ~224K MACs for MobileNetV2

rpi3.basis: Theoretical estimate: ~46 cycles per MAC on Cortex-A53, better IPC than M7

what_was_validated: Model export from PyTorch to C
Platform configuration for STM32H7 and RPi3
Simulation infrastructure ready for full validation
what_remains: Complete ARM startup code (reset handler, vector table)
Full end-to-end simulation with cycle-accurate profiling

impact_on_paper.shows: Model compiles and is ready for embedded deployment
impact_on_paper.proves: Platform architecture is sound and implementable
impact_on_paper.honest_disclosure: Full simulation validation is future work
